productDisplayName: Timberland Kids Boys Casual Black Casual Shoes
description: A perfect gift for your little boy who is fast growing up, the timberland Youth Asphalt Trail Chukka boot combines the best of style and comfort to make your young man feel all the more grown up. With a classic design and cushioned comfort, it's a great way to prepare him for adoloscent fashion.UpperFull-grain leather upper for durability and comfortHi-ankle with 100% recycled PET lining for absolute breathabilityLacing system with 100% organic waxed cotton laces for a snug, customised FitHaul loop in leather with a nubuck inner to hang the shoe MidsoleMan-made sole for durabilityOrthoilite footbed with leather footbed cover for absolute shock absorption, lightweight cushioning and climate controlRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticOutsole42% recycled Green Rubber outsole Strategically placed lugs radiating fron the mid-length to the periphery on the forefoot and heel, and has flowerlet lugs on the mid-length for absolute grip and traction on various surfacesRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleShoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to restore shoe shineDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
